item.title: Dump of actual and past farming techniques. Enjoy !
item.description:
Cherry Radishes Harvester
2. Perfect for potato fields and more. Feed your chicks !
3. The method of collecting cinnamon.
4. Life is better with a basket full of blueberries.
6. Old-school Henderson trencher
7. Planting peeper seedings.
8. This machine harvests carrots.
9. Tree grafting
10. Weed zapper
13. Plowing a huge field with a (probably GPS assisted) tractor.
14. remote controlled lawn mower.
15. Step feeder singulating and orienting corn cobs.
16. The robots are coming for your broccoli.
17. Hay baler yeeter.
19. If you ordered the big ones.
20. Agricultural drone.
21. Juicing Made Easy.

item.title: What Happened Today #150
item.description: Every relationship is now a hostage situation. Trump governs by deadline and threat. He tells allies they have trade cutoffs, senators to vote his way or else, and gave a university president a day and time to resign. Authoritarians replace law with coercion, negotiation with extortion, and partnership with fear. The worst thing is his megabill. WE NEED YOU to call your Senators right now. Tell Democrats that they must obstruct, delay, and push back on this human rights disaster. Tell Republicans that their career is over in your state if they dare hurt seniors, the disabled, and the poor. Assure them all that you know what is really in the bill. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist SUBSCRIBE (It's Free!) - gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-megabill-delayed 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iranian-officials-comms 3. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-months-only 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wont-stand-israel-trial 5. https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-deadline-july9 6. https://go.govbrief.today/canda-drops-digital-tax 7. https://go.govbrief.today/bill-cuts-wind-solar-credits 8. https://go.govbrief.today/tiktok-buyer-2-weeks 9. https://go.govbrief.today/tillis-wont-run 10. https://go.govbrief.today/some-medicaid-nursinghome-cuts 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-urges-overrule-parliamentarian 12. https://go.govbrief.today/alien-enemies-act-appeal 13. https://go.govbrief.today/mullins-deport-babies 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-noem-visit-detention-camp 15. https://go.govbrief.today/senator-reveals-univ-president-deadline Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/felon-released-testify-kilmar CALL RIGHT NOW! - https://go.govbrief.today/most-horrible-provisions-megabill SUBSCRIBE (It's Free!) - gbounacos.substack.com ** In later today for backlogged comments, Imgur. Have a great week, y'all!**
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A pose a day: Grounded
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. LAST DAY FOR THIS! I'd like to take a second to call attention to my annual Pride fundraiser pack. It's $5 (or you can name-your-price for more) and all profits from the pack get split up amongst 3 orgs: • The Trevor Project, a nonprofit organization founded in 1998 focused on suicide prevention efforts among LGBTQIA+ folks • The Theater Offensive, a theater company in Boston focused on liberating art by, for, and about queer and trans people of color that transcends artistic boundaries, celebrates cultural abundance, and dismantles oppression. • Transgender Emergency Fund MA, providing assistance for low-income and homeless transgender people living in Massachusetts since 2008. I'll be running it until end of June. Consider picking up a pack here! https://ko-fi.com/s/32a448ad89 Hope this pose helps you! Happy drawing! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: I carved a thresher shark
item.description:
Thresher shark I made from walnut
Top profile cut with a bandsaw
Sketched the side profile and carved to the lines
I used a variety of dremel attachments to carve it
Sanded 100-150-220 grit

item.title: Pepper's Ghost illusion Diorama
item.description: “This video showcases a cemetery diorama where miniature spirits are created using the "Pepper's Ghost" illusion technique, a method that projects an image to appear as a ghost by reflecting it off a piece of glass at an angle, originally popularized by John Henry Pepper in the 19th century. This technique, often mistaken for holograms, relies on reflection rather than laser technology and has been historically used in various entertainment settings, including Disney's Haunted Mansion and modern concerts like Tupac's appearance at Coachella in 2012.
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Stop killing games - An unlikely revival story
item.description:
Last summer the Stop Killing Games project got an EU citizens' initiative started. What is Stop Killing Games? What is an EU citizens' initiative?
The Stop Killing Games project (https://www.stopkillinggames.com) aims to stop game publishers from killing games when they are done with them. If the publishers have given up trying to earn money on a game, they shouldn't be allowed to shut it down. Only let it go. There are several reasons why this is entirely reasonable requests. Here are two: 1) The consumers who bought the game bought the game 2) Gaming history is culture history, it ought to be preserved There is, of course, another side to this. It does take effort, time, and resources. Not much, but also not entirely trivial.
An EU citizens' initiative is an official EU government hosted petition. If it reaches a million votes within a year (and above a rather low minimal threshold in at least seven different member states), the EU Parliament WILL set down a commission to look into the issue seriously.
So what happened? The initiative started out strong, and got endorsements from many places, including Linus Sebastian of Linus Tech Tips fame: https://youtu.be/HgeISidAung But there was one major opponent. PirateSoftware's Jason Thor Hall. Over the course of one stream and two youtube videos he criticized the hell out of every aspect of the project. And with the reach he has, the SKG project lost all its steam just as it was getting going. (Technically, the timing may have been a coincidence. Just to get that out of the way.) A lot of people (me included) thought he grossly misrepresented the SKG project. But that didn't matter. The damage was done. The signatures dried up.
It has now been ten months since those videos. A week ago, the petition didn't even have half a million signatures (which is wildly impressive, mind you) and with a little over a month to go, it was looking grim. The spearhead of the movement, Ross Scott, had decided to not address Hall's accusations because he didn't want to be seen as adding to the drama. Now he finally felt the time had come, and he published a video (https://youtu.be/HIfRLujXtUo) basically announcing that it wasn't going to work, and at the same time address the Hall situation. If you look a couple images up, you can see there are currently quite a few more than half a million signatures. That's from an hour ago. What happened was his video was picked up by a lot of other youtubers, spreading the SKG message far and wide. Since then it has been getting over 20,000 signatures every day. I gave up hope about this thing long ago. With the current momentum (which I have no idea how long it'll last) this will go through, and even a couple weeks before the deadline. In my opinion it's basically a tiny miracle. If you're an EU citizen, I ask you to be one of today's 30,000 and actually sign the thing: https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public
item.dc:creator: Higure

item.title: Bold strategy, Cotton
item.dc:creator: TheBloodyLady

item.title: My favorite vid of the past 100 years
item.dc:creator: Tartiliscious

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1398 (embrace jousting)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I wish I could be involved in an experiment like this. Instead, the closest I get is "how far can a green gremlin stick his beak into my ears?"
Oops.
Very Disco. Very Elesium.
Two dreams I remember last night: one was a sort of combo between "How I Met Your Mother" and Deep Space Nine, where architect Ted Mosby was on assignment helping design something on the Promenade and was hanging out often in Quark's with Bashir and O'Brien. An attempt was being made to court/bang Jadzia Dax, which, at the time of dream's ending, had ended in arrangements in a Holosuite Date to New York City.
Dream two made much less sense: ended rescuing a couple who rolled their car in the middle of nowhere in Northern Arizona on their way to their isolated home in the middle of nowhere. Husband was exceedingly grumpy and miserable, the wife was actually kind and thankful. The house was new, had no water, so I was paid in some sort of beer that was a blonde coffee stout with cinnamon and cardamom that looked interesting, but was in tins, rather than cans, because the brewery believed in "historical accuracy".
Came up with an idea for a novel, too, that would use a large chunk of the accidental autobiography i wrote almost 10 years ago [ugh] at better times in the world [citation needed]. It would be called "Memoirs of an old Chronomancer" or "A Chonomancer looks at 50." The idea being a magician from the medium-distant future hides in small-mountain town Arizona in the 2010's, before everything goes to shit, because nobody expects him to go here to hide, and befriends a lonely wine critic in his self-imposed exile. Includes the following segments: "So how will you know when it's safe to return to your home time?" "Fuck if I know, I can't see through time, I just travel through it. As yall say around this time, Fuck it, We Ball." "I don't know anyone who says that." "Shit." And: "So this is the hight of America's power and prestige? And people are going to be nostalgic for this in a hundred years?" "Yeah, you have no idea how people are going to be nostalgic for this in... uh... a lot sooner than you think, I'm afraid."
Roman statues were painted.
Add Pippin to my shoulder and an Orthodox icon somewhere in the back and... yeah, basically.
Me, this morning at 5am to remove a potroast from my crackpot for the week. Then realizing I have no containers to bring this or the sort-of-mac-and cheese to work. You know what. I'm keeping that typo.
Again, I ask you: do the newest civilizations in the latest expansion featuring 3 kingdoms China, the Jurchens, and... someone else have campaigns for them?
Mood.
Derpy Carnotaurus is adorable.
I mean, yeah, this is how i functioned from 13 years old and half of the time still do.
Unfortunately I have very good forest sense; I am able to find my way through the woods easily. Cities, no, cities can be a problem. But maybe the woods have remembered me since the very first time I was comfortable in them?
Should scratch that out and say "Byzantium"
Thanks, @TheBloodyLady. The one @AlwaysUpvotesCatgirls made will feature in a future dump.
A South American family related to ducks.
This is just what you'd call "Big Pippin Energy"
Like me. And bird phylogeny.
...honestly, I wish I had someone boning me for support. Or someone to bone for support. Or hugging for support. God, I haven't had a kind physical touch in two weeks.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "REEEP! awwwwp." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
